author: DominicVainMod
content:
@everyone

Golden Ticket Event Starts Tomorrow

It's time to see if the cosmic currents are in your favor.  

Get ready for $1,350,000 in Star Atlas loot to be up for grabs over 8 weeks during our Golden Ticket Event!

Submit your golden tickets into week 1 starting tomorrow at 3:30PM ET / 7:30PM UTC ()

 | Learn more and see what loot is available for each week: https://medium.com/star-atlas/golden-tickets-star-atlas-giving-million-loot-revolutionary-game-solana-b3d01930e9dc
